texto: 'Skyline' is an alien invasion film that really takes an interesting look at the genre. The writers did an amazing job of creating a new take at how life from other planets come and plan to invade Earth.
explicacao: Citação de Eric Balfour sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “'Skyline' is an alien invasion film that really takes an interesting look at the genre. The write…” articula vida, job, plan em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como job e plan.
